title: Carry out basic repairs to vehicle body panels
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Carry out basic repairs to vehicle body panels demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to repair body panel

pcs.text: Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for repairing body panel 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify and report potential hazards and risks associated with task to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify and check tools and equipment required for repairing body panel for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for repairing body panel 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify and report potential hazards and risks associated with task to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify and check tools and equipment required for repairing body panel for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Interpret task instructions and identify vehicle body panel to be worked on1.2 Source and interpret manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures for repairing body panel 1.3 Source and interpret safety and environmental requirements1.4 Identify and report potential hazards and risks associated with task to workplace supervisor1.5 Identify and check tools and equipment required for repairing body panel for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to repair body panel

elements.title: Carry out basic panel repairs

pcs.text: Shape damaged panel using basic panel beating techniques according to workplace instructions and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.2 Carry out body filling and metal finishing according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Complete panel repair to pre-paint condition according to workplace instructions and procedures, and safety and environmental requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Shape damaged panel using basic panel beating techniques according to workplace instructions and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.2 Carry out body filling and metal finishing according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Complete panel repair to pre-paint condition according to workplace instructions and procedures, and safety and environmental requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Shape damaged panel using basic panel beating techniques according to workplace instructions and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components, tools or equipment2.2 Carry out body filling and metal finishing according to workplace procedures and safety and environmental requirements2.3 Complete panel repair to pre-paint condition according to workplace instructions and procedures, and safety and environmental requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Carry out basic panel repairs

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Conduct final inspection according to workplace procedures and confirm vehicle is ready for use 3.2 Clear work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures3.3 Complete documentation according to workplace procedures

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete work processes
